name: Fleet Feet Hoboken
description_short: Fleet Feet Hoboken is a credit repair provider based in Hoboken, New Jersey. Rated 4.8/5 with 230 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Fleet Feet Hoboken is a credit repair provider serving clients in Hoboken, New Jersey. With 230 Google reviews and a 4.8/5.0 rating, Fleet Feet Hoboken has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a clothing store, shoe store, Fleet Feet Hoboken provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Hoboken, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Fleet Feet Hoboken operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Hoboken, New Jersey area who are considering Fleet Feet Hoboken should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
